description_long: This office building is a tall, rectangular structure with a grid-like facade composed of evenly spaced windows and vertical columns. The exterior features a mix of light gray and beige tones, with the front side displaying a prominent grid of square windows framed by white or light-colored mullions. The side and rear facades are more subdued, with fewer visible window details and a more uniform, blocky appearance. The roof is flat and patterned with a mosaic of gray tiles, suggesting a utilitarian design. The base of the building is darker, possibly indicating a different material or a recessed ground floor. The overall design is functional and modern, with a strong emphasis on regularity and repetition.
description: A tall, rectangular office building with a grid of square windows and a flat, patterned roof. The facade features light gray and beige tones with a modern, repetitive design.
description_view_0: The side view shows a uniform, blocky facade with vertical columns and minimal window detail.
description_view_1: The rear view displays a grid of vertical lines and panels, with a consistent, repetitive pattern and no visible entrance.
description_view_2: The opposite side view mirrors view 0, with the same blocky, columnar appearance and limited window visibility.
description_view_3: The front view features a prominent grid of square windows framed by white mullions, a darker base, and the most visually detailed facade.
attribute_window_pattern: Regular grid of square windows arranged in horizontal and vertical rows, framed by white mullions, with consistent spacing across the facade.
